app.title: Mini Timesheets
app.subtitle: Track hourly employees, log time, and approve weeks.

home.title: Dashboard
home.subtitle: This week
home.description: Overview of hours, payroll and pending approvals.

pending.title: Pending approvals
pending.empty: Nothing pending — every week with hours is reviewed.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or was moved.

errorPage.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

employees.title: Employees
employees.subtitle: Manage your hourly employees and their pay rates.

deactivate.title: Deactivate this employee?
deactivate.description: They'll be hidden from active lists and you won't be able to log time for them. Past entries stay visible. You can reactivate them later.

reactivate.title: Reactivate this employee?
reactivate.description: They'll appear in active lists again and you'll be able to log time for them.

empty.title: No employees yet
empty.description: Add your first employee to start tracking time.

timeEntries.title: Time entries
timeEntries.subtitle: Log hours worked per employee, by week.

form.createDescription: Add hours worked for this week.

delete.title: Delete this entry?
delete.description: This permanently removes the time entry. This cannot be undone.

locked.title: Week approved
locked.description: This week is approved and locked — entries can't be changed.

inactive.title: Inactive employee
inactive.description: You can view past entries, but can't log time for an inactive employee.

empty.noEmployeeHint: Choose an employee to view and log their time.
empty.noEntriesHint: Log time to add the first entry for this week.

weeklySummary.title: Weekly summary
weeklySummary.subtitle: Regular vs overtime hours and pay per employee, by week.

empty.title: No hours this week
empty.description: No employee has logged time for this week yet.

approve.title: Approve this week?
approve.description: Approving locks the week — its time entries can no longer be created, edited, or deleted.

reject.title: Reject this week?
reject.description: The week stays editable so entries can be fixed and re-submitted.

reopen.title: Reopen this week?
reopen.description: This unlocks the week so its time entries can be edited again.
